name: TERT 300kb SK-N-SH tissue-matched (ENCODE H3K27ac + CTCF)
description: 300kb window spanning the TERT inter-TAD boundary region on chr5p15.33. SK-N-SH (neuroblastoma) as neural proxy for TERT-driven cancers (glioma, melanoma). H3K27ac from ENCODE SK-N-SH (ENCFF138VUT, ENCSR564IGJ). CTCF from ENCODE SK-N-SH (ENCFF244QKO, ENCSR541AMF). KEY DIVERGENCE: only 2 H3K27ac peaks (both at CLPTM1L, none at TERT TSS) vs K562 5 peaks. CTCF 5 sites (subset of K562 10). TERT promoter hotspot mutations create de novo ETS binding sites — mechanism is promoter-mutation-driven, not enhancer-driven.

enhancers.name: CLPTM1L_H3K27ac_strong
enhancers.note: Strongest H3K27ac peak in window: chr5:1345184-1345701 (signal=7.36, -log10q=31.81). At CLPTM1L 3' end. Co-localizes with K562 strongest peak (signal=16.44). MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy=0.8 reflecting dominant enhancer activity

enhancers.name: CLPTM1L_upstream_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Weak H3K27ac peak: chr5:1328381-1329262 (signal=2.94, -log10q=4.68). In CLPTM1L gene body. Not present in K562 data at this position. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy=0.4 reflecting weak activity

ctcf_sites.name: TERLR1_CTCF_strongest
ctcf_sites.note: Strongest CTCF in window: chr5:1174350-1174879 (signal=822.70). Co-localizes with K562 strongest CTCF (signal=186.14). Left TAD boundary anchor. 4.4× stronger in SK-N-SH than K562

ctcf_sites.name: upstream_TERLR1_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF: chr5:1167644-1168609 (signal=456.12). Co-localizes with K562 CTCF cluster. Part of left TAD boundary. 2.7× stronger in SK-N-SH than K562 (169.36)

ctcf_sites.name: SLC6A19_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF: chr5:1208896-1209350 (signal=253.42). Co-localizes with K562 SLC6A19 CTCF (signal=127.70). 2× stronger in SK-N-SH

ctcf_sites.name: TERLR1_SLC6A19_intergenic_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF: chr5:1204662-1205126 (signal=69.96). Co-localizes with K562 intergenic CTCF (signal=84.68). Similar strength

ctcf_sites.name: LINC01511_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF: chr5:1380216-1380758 (signal=478.79). Co-localizes with K562 LINC01511 CTCF (signal=69.42). 6.9× stronger in SK-N-SH. Near right TAD boundary

enhancer_divergence.summary: 4 K562-only, 1 SKNS-only, 1 shared. Dramatic enhancer loss (5→2). No TERT TSS enhancer in SK-N-SH — consistent with promoter-mutation-driven reactivation.

ctcf_divergence.summary: 5 K562-only, 0 SKNS-only, 5 shared. SK-N-SH CTCF is strict subset of K562. TAD boundary anchors preserved (stronger), intra-TAD insulators lost.

tissue_match_comparison.hypothesis: Fewer enhancers → weaker structural discrimination. But CTCF boundary anchors STRONGER → TAD structure may be more rigid. Net effect unclear — could go either way.
